title: Fix off-by-one in plan step index validation
prompt: In src/agent_runtime/planner.py, the step index validation raises an error for 0-indexed steps but the schema allows 0 as a valid index. Fix the off-by-one bug and add a regression test.

rubric.notes: Brownfield bug fix. test-hardening skill should be triggered. Adversarial review is advisory for medium-risk.
